summary: Frontend testing completed for Planning du Personnel page refactoring. All requested features are working correctly: full month display without horizontal scrolling, users grouped by service with collapsible sections, availability toggle, month navigation, and proper visual styling.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Service grouping logic correctly handles users without service assignment (Sans service)
Statistics calculation is accurate and updates in real-time
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Planning page fully tested. Features verified: 1) Full month visible (31 days for January 2026), 2) Users grouped by service (Maintenance, Production, QHSE, Sans service), 3) Collapsible service sections work, 4) Availability toggle works with API integration and toast notifications, 5) Month navigation (prev/next/today) works, 6) Statistics accurate (Personnel total=6, Disponibles=6, Indisponibles=0), 7) Today (12th) highlighted in blue, 8) Weekends styled with gray background, 9) All data-testid attributes present and functional.

planning_page_display.details: Page loads correctly with title 'Planning du Personnel'

full_month_visible.details: All 31 days of January 2026 visible without horizontal scrolling

users_grouped_by_service.details: 4 service groups found: Maintenance (1), Production (1), QHSE (1), Sans service (3)

collapsible_sections.details: Clicking service header collapses/expands user rows correctly

availability_toggle.details: Clicking cell toggles availability state with API call and toast notification

month_navigation.details: Previous/Next buttons navigate months correctly (Janvier 2026 -> Décembre 2025 -> Février 2026)

statistics.details: Personnel total=6, Disponibles=6, Indisponibles=0 - matches actual user count

data_testid_attributes.details: All required data-testid attributes present: planning-title, planning-grid, today-btn, prev-month-btn, next-month-btn, current-month, service-section-*, service-header-*, user-row-*, availability-cell-*
